title: stylocoryna odorata
intro: Stylocoryna odorata, also known as the fragrant stylo, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a deciduous shrub native to tropical Africa, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stylocoryna odorata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Stylocoryna odorata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
